tldr: Remco Evenepoel destroyed the 12.2 km flat ITT by six seconds over Josh Tarling — the kind of result Evenepoel was Red Bull-Bora's primary signing for. Del Toro lost 42 seconds and the leader's jersey.

narrative.headline: Evenepoel dominates
narrative.body: 12.2 km, pan-flat, out-and-back on Hudayriyat Island. Evenepoel — riding his first WorldTour ITT in Red Bull-Bora kit — set a time six seconds clear of Tarling. Del Toro, the GC leader, lost 42 seconds and 27 positions on stage.

gcImpact.headline: Evenepoel into the leader's jersey
gcImpact.body: Evenepoel takes the GC lead from Del Toro. The week now resolves on the climbing stage to Jebel Hafeet.
